'''Ned''' was the son of a [[Gender/Legends|female]] mechanic living on [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]]. It was he who helped the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] to identify [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] and [[Noor R'aya]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
